## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] Relevant sandbox/proposal-only evidence updated, if applicable
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, cookies, private keys, or raw credentials added

## Safety

- [ ] No live Obsidian vault mutation without approval manifest
- [ ] Protected paths remain protected: `.obsidian`, `_Backups`, `_Archive`, `.trash`, Soul-protected areas
- [ ] Generated artifacts are not committed unless intentionally documented
